projects.title: Crypto Whale Logistics Engine
projects.description: The crypto market moves invisibly. I built an engine that tracks massive order flows on Hyperliquid in real-time, helping retail traders see exactly how whales position themselves before the market reacts.

projects.title: TradeMind Autonomous Planner
projects.description: Trading requires discipline that humans naturally lack. I developed an agent that reviews past trading data, structures a plan using AI, and directly executes the strategy. It removes emotion from the equation entirely.

projects.title: Procurement Analytics Engine
projects.description: Public procurement generates vast amounts of transactional data, but actionable insights are often difficult to uncover. I designed an analytics platform that transforms procurement transactions, vendor activity, and purchasing patterns into decision-ready intelligence for monitoring and evaluation.

currentFocus.title: Government Technology
currentFocus.problem: Public procurement systems are often slowed down by administrative friction and lack of transparency, creating bottlenecks in essential service delivery.
currentFocus.whyItMatters: Efficiency in procurement directly impacts how public funds are utilized and how quickly infrastructure and services reach the citizens who need them most.
currentFocus.whatIAmBuilding: I am modernizing procurement workflows by building performance-driven digital interfaces that prioritize data integrity and reduce the cognitive load on public servants.
currentFocus.impact: Closing the gap between policy intent and public service delivery.

currentFocus.title: Artificial Intelligence
currentFocus.problem: Most AI implementations act as superficial wrappers, failing to address the underlying logic required for high-stakes decision-making.
currentFocus.whyItMatters: In environments like finance or public policy, we need autonomous logic that understands strict rules and constraints without human bias or fatigue.
currentFocus.whatIAmBuilding: I am developing autonomous agents designed to parse complex datasets and execute rule-based strategies that remain consistent under pressure.
currentFocus.impact: Moving the human role from manual execution to high-level system strategy.

currentFocus.title: Data Intelligence
currentFocus.problem: Organizations generate massive transactional data but often lack the tools to convert those records into actionable patterns.
currentFocus.whyItMatters: Without decision-ready intelligence, monitoring and evaluation become reactive rituals rather than proactive management tools.
currentFocus.whatIAmBuilding: I am engineering analytics engines that transform thousands of procurement packages into clear, visual signals for real-time monitoring and evaluation.
currentFocus.impact: Turning silent transactional records into actionable foresight.

currentFocus.title: Web3 Research
currentFocus.problem: Digital markets are often opaque, with massive movements occurring behind layers of abstraction that retail participants cannot see.
currentFocus.whyItMatters: Verifiable, immutable data is the only foundation for trust in a global digital economy. Transparency shouldn't be a luxury.
currentFocus.whatIAmBuilding: I am building pipelines that track on-chain order flows and whale logistics to map out Market Mechanics and identify hidden liquidity patterns.
currentFocus.impact: Democratizing access to high-fidelity market data.
